titleStmt.title: SII 25.56: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 56. (A.R. No. 56 of 1908.) VAḺUVŪR, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Brahmapurīśvara temple.
This incomplete inscription may be assigned to c. 12th century A.D on palaeographical grounds.

It records the gift of 150 kalam of paddy by Tuṇavar, son of Āṟpākkiḻāṉ Iḷaiyāḻvār, a native of Āṟpākkam in Māgaṟal-nāḍu in Kāliyūrkkōṭṭam in the same maṇḍalam for the tiruppaḷḷi-eḻuchchi service to the deity Ayanīśvaram-uḍaiyār. The śivabr-hmaṇas of the temple of Tiru Ayanīśvaram-uḍaiyār at Vaḻugūr in Irumbīḍu-nāḍu in Veṇkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam undertook to provide food-offerings lamp, etc., to the deity at the early morning service (tiruppaḷḷi-eḻuchchi).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī virarājentiradevarkku yāṇṭu 7vatu jayaṅ koṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu veṇkuṉṟak ko
ṭṭattu Irumpeṭunāṭṭu vaḻukūrt tiru Ayaṉiśvaramuṭaiyār koyil kāṇiuṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇarom Im maṇ
ṭalattuk kāliyūrkkoṭṭattu mākaṟal nāṭṭu Āṟpākkattu Āṟpākkiḻāṉ Iḷaiyāḻvār makaṉ tuṇaivar pakkal nāṅ
kaḷ Innāyaṉārkkut tiruppaḷḷi Eḻuccikku Upaiyamākap poliyūṭṭuk kaikkoṇṭa �100 5 10 ḷ In nellu nūṟṟaimpatiṉ kalamum
kaikkoṇṭu tiruppaḷḷi Eḻuccikku nitta nāṉāḻi Arici tiru Amutu cantirātittavarai celuttak kaṭavomākavum Ic coṟu nāṅkaḷe koṇ
ṭu Iccan=tikku tiruviḷakkumiṭṭu ney celuttak kaṭavomākavum cammatittom Ikkoyil kāṇi UContinuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 25.56 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
